title: 5X Full Page Magnifying Glass for Reading, Lightweight Rectangular Magnifier Provides Large Book Page Viewing Area, Upgraded Handheld Magnifier for Reading Small Prints for Seniors Low Vision
features: 5X clear magnification: The book magnifier is made of advanced anti-glare Fresnel lenses, which are lighter than glass lenses, and can also clearly magnify small print by 500% without optical distortion, making it suitable for seniors to use for reading small prints, checking items, and more.

Lightweight: Our large magnifying glass is lightweight, only 3.8 ounces, designed for seniors with weak hands. You won't feel tired even holding this page magnifier for a long time to read, bringing you a good reading experience.

Full page large viewing area: The reading magnifying glass has a rectangular design that provides full-page reading with coverage up to 7x5 inches. You don't have to keep moving your hand while reading, allowing you to focus on your reading. Place magnifying sheet within 2-4 inches of the page for optimal magnification.

Upgraded Handle: Our rectangular magnifying glass is ergonomically designed and the grips have been upgraded to achieve a grip that can be fully held on both sides, ensuring a comfortable feel for continued use. Our magnifying glass can also be used alternately by left and right hand, you can choose the right direction (vertical or horizontal) according to your personal habits, and this magnifying sheet for reading also comes with a anti-slip wrist strap for an easy grip that won't fall off easily.

Present Ideas: Our magnifying reader is the ideal choice for seniors, reading enthusiasts, and people with low vision, and we are committed to creating a great reading experience for those in need. Also our large magnifying glass for elderly comes with a nice storage bag and cleaning cloth for easy use.
